entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 323,328Chapters: 69/110Kudos: 3,178

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: Within Four Walls
entry.summary:
Author: Oakfiddle

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,638Chapters: 2/9Kudos: 8

Summary: Merlin and his mum wans to move away from Ealdor to get a fresh start, to leave his mum's abusive ex-boyfriend behind.They go to Camelot to look at a flat. His mum falls in love with the flat, and Merlin falls in love with the property manager, who also happens be the landlord's son.Why can't life be simple for once?

entry.title: Worlds Apart
entry.summary:
Author: VenomStrife

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,776Chapters: 2/12Kudos: 3

Summary: Merlin gets transported to an alternate universe where he doesn't exist. His one goal is to get back to Arthur, but this other world is hellbent on keeping him there. Arthur just wants Merlin back. He gets the help of two unlikely allies. Or better known at the story where Merthur pine for each other even when they're worlds apart.

entry.title: An Insufferable Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Araemrys

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,014Chapters: 8/12Kudos: 24

Summary: Merlin, the son of the famous bakers in Camelot, had been assigned by his parents to deliver bread for tonight's feast in the castle. That was the first time he met the prince of Camelot, who wasn't like his expectations at all. Arthur Pendragon, the prince of Camelot, returned to the castle after his mission to secure a village from bandits, only to find a boy standing in a room admiring his mother's painting-a boy he found to be insufferable later. From the day they met, they decided that they wouldn't get along well, only to find a shockingly different path in life that they never expected. or Arthur and Merlin didn't like each other. They remained somehow in a complicated state between enemies and a feeling of interest in each other. That was, until one day a sorceress playfully transported them to the future, only to find they were a happy family with a son.

entry.title: Sublysis
entry.summary:
Author: RubiesareforHunting

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 173,673Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 411

Summary: Merlin is a great detective. They call him Magic, for a reason. But when Arthur Pendragon realizes that the famous detective who has been plaguing his criminal organization for five years, is designated Submissive…well. All’s fair in love and war. At an impasse where both of them will do anything it takes to keep the other one from revealing their secrets, the only way to survive might just be a truce that neither of their organizations can know about.Mutually assured destruction never felt so good.

entry.title: Soldier, Servant, Poet, King
entry.summary:
Author: Grammar_Beane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,178Chapters: 18/24Kudos: 166

Summary: Arthur and Merlin were just going on a hunting trip. It was meant to be a nice, easy trip through the woods around Camelot. It ended with them being chased by an unknown monster into an unknown cave, stepping out into an unknown world. Maybe the weird bard and the magic monster hunter they found in the woods could help? Jaskier and Geralt were on their way north for the winter—Jaskier to Oxenfurt, Geralt to Kaer Morhen. But they were still a ways away when two odd men claiming to be from a place called “Camelot” stumbled into them. Geralt immediately learned Merlin has magic, and Jaskier could see the chemistry between the pair from a mile away. Arthur wanted to get back to Camelot.Merlin wanted to get back to Camelot, and stay alive while his magic seemed intent on acting bizarre.Geralt wanted to travel with Jaskier.Jaskier wanted to travel with Geralt, and get those two idiots to confess everything. It took some time, but they all got what they wanted. More or less.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Tears and Laughter
entry.summary:
Author: itsmepaper

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,778Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 14

Summary: Merlin coughed to get Arthur's attention and it worked. Arthur frowned at Merlin’s tone. “Are you alright? You sound-” Merlin stepped forward. Arthur’s confusion deepened, but he didn’t have time to question it. Merlin’s hand came up, the broken blade glinting for a heartbeat. Gwen screamed his name. "Arthur! Run!"Arthur gasped in shock as he instinctively hit the jug away as the towel dropped, showing his private parts. He quickly wraps the towel around himself, noticing Gwen and Gaius standing there. "Gwen! Gaius! Why was there a jug aimed at my manservant?"When Merlin returns to Camelot under Morgana’s spell, everything goes wrong in ways no one expects. One moment splits into two completely different outcomes - one heartbreaking, one ridiculous - as Arthur faces the consequences of an enchanted Merlin with very different results. Based on A Servant of Two Masters.

entry.title: Different Destiny: The Outlaw Prince
entry.summary:
Author: tansyuduri

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 87,462Chapters: 18/25Kudos: 201

Summary: When Merlin's magic is exposed shortly before season 2 starts, the path of destiny starts changing forever. Now on the run with Arthur, Morgana, and Gwen. Merlin hopes to convince Arthur that magic is totally good instead of him and Morgana just being an exception. Morgana, meanwhile, hopes to convince him to usurp his father. As allies are gathered and Arthur realizes the injustice in his kingdom, it looks more and more like he will have to act in a drastic way. A way he dreads.   Meanwhile, Arthur and Merlin are growing closer and closer and might just have feelings for each other. Something they probably should be better about realizing, considering the example of Gwen and Morgana right next to them.   In a land of myth and a time of magic, the destiny of a great kingdom now rests on the shoulders of four, their names: Merlin, Arthur, Guinevere, and Morgana

entry.title: Curia Regis
entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,808Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 38

Summary: A court Adviser that has been under Uther for decades starts to worry about what will happen when the old king dies and his son, Arthur, takes over. So he plans to win the Young prince’s favor by giving him the thing he wants the most… Merlin.

entry.title: With you, time and time again
entry.summary:
Author: BookiePookies25

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,764Chapters: 4/20Kudos: 100

Summary: “This is a destiny of your own making, Arthur Pendragon. Whether you regret it or not is of no consequence. You have offered your soul, and it is a promise you cannot break.” After Arthur dies, a mysterious force throws Merlin and Arthur back in time, right to when they first met. Burdened by memories, overstrung by knowledge, they navigate an unfamiliar Camelot while trying to ease back into their comfortable dynamic before the revelation of Merlin's magic. But nothing’s ever easy. For one, Merlin has the unnerving skill to dive head first into trouble, and this time round Arthur know enough not to be completely oblivious. Are their memories enough to help them usher in the promised golden age? And what do events from a thousand years ago have to do with everything? OrIn which we attempt to untangle the emotional trauma that was Merlin’s life, the messed up but precious friendship that was Merlin and Arthur, and the character injustice that was Morgana. OrHow destiny was made

entry.title: but i looked to the sky and said, please
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,125Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: “Lady Freya,” the creature sneered, somehow both respectful and irate. “You have outlasted your foretold expiration date.”Arthur felt something drop in his stomach.He had a sickening idea what the creature was referring to.Freya’s posture did not change. She did not turn to Arthur, but her shoulder brushed his.“Yet I am here. Alive.” Her smile was all teeth and no warmth.“And I want my husband back.”

entry.title: The Parallel Palace
entry.summary:
Author: PaperInfinity

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,800Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 40

Summary: “I’ve realized something about Arthur—about your version, that is. What it is that makes him so different.” “And what is that?” Merlin mumbled. His body was stuffed with cotton, his tongue made of straw. The words tumbled from his mouth like stones. “He cares for you,” Emrys whispered, “because he can control you. He believes you are simple; insignificant. You’re like a…like a pet.” “That’s not true.” By the time the words left his mouth, Merlin already didn’t believe them. — After stumbling across a strange stone on a hunting trip, Merlin and Arthur find themselves trapped in an inverted Camelot: a world where a Druid named Emrys is the king. This other Merlin—charismatic, powerful and terrifying—has a strange obsession with Arthur, and Arthur appears to be falling under his spell. But nothing here is as it seems; and if Merlin and Arthur can't be honest with each other, they may never make it home alive. (Now complete!)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Summary: Prophecies had a way of circling him like vultures. The druids had spoken of Emrys in voices that carried far too much certainty.But suspicion was one thing.Fire was another.

entry.title: Losing or gaining control (is sometimes closer to each other than you think)
entry.summary:
Author: sword_and_shield_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 231,586Chapters: 55/58Kudos: 170

Summary: Merlin has never learnt to control his magic. It is completely guided by his emotions and that usually doesn't turn out well.Arthur was chased out of Camelot as a young prince. His own sister killed their father and now he is just waiting for the right moment to reclaim his kingdom.When Merlin and Arthur meet, a hope seems to take root in the world that all will be well.Magical figures, dark magic, lies and betrayal make their experiences together anything but easy. But deep friendships, trust, loyalty and love bring them ever closer to their goal.Will Merlin find the control he needs and can Arthur forget his past to open his heart?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Golden Hair/Golden Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: wryterwolf

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,329Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 124

Summary: A rewriting of the series where Arthur discovers Merlin's magic way earlier. It will follow the series where it can and diverge as needed, with some fun little scenes inspired by Tumblr posts.This begins in the aftermath of the battle for Ealdor. Also don’t forget to check out part 2 of the series. It has additional backstory and plot.

entry.title: As beautiful as in our dreams
entry.summary:
Author: Linowish

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 339Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: After season 1, we said "I wish it was like this" and I wanted to try it too.   Merlin was getting really tired and continuing with his life without receiving any thanks; it was very difficult.Arthur was like everyone around him; everyone saw him only as a prince, no one saw him as a friend, except Merlin.

entry.title: i need you to need me, it's no surprise
entry.summary:
Author: highfunctioningclotpole

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 498Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

Summary: Arthur's had a shit day, hell a shit week, at his job. The last thing he wants to see is someone touching *his* Merlin.Cue: Super possessive and jealous Arthur Pendragon.

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 81,138Chapters: 55/?Kudos: 30

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.
